ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "uscf_id" INTEGER /* USCF ID of the player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the player's account */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence of the player */,
  "joining_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the player */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of tournament (e.g., blitz, rapid, classical) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the tournament is held */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the organizing entity */,
  "registration_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for tournament registration */,
  "registration_end_date" TEXT /* End date for tournament registration */,
  "prize_pool" INTEGER /* Total prize pool for the tournament */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the tournament */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tournament is open for registration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the tournament (e.g., upcoming, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the game belongs to */,
  "player1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first player */,
  "player2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second player */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "moves" INTEGER /* Number of moves played in the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number in the tournament */,
  "time_control" TEXT /* Time control for the game (e.g., 30+0, 10+5) */,
  "opening" TEXT /* Opening used in the game */,
  "white_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the player with the white pieces */,
  "black_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the player with the black pieces */,
  "time_taken" INTEGER /* Total time taken for the game in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_player2_id FOREIGN KEY ("player2_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_player1_id FOREIGN KEY ("player1_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the player */,
  "ranking_date" TEXT /* Date when the ranking was updated */,
  "previous_rank" INTEGER /* Previous rank of the player */,
  "rating_change" INTEGER /* Change in the player's rating */,
  "number_of_games" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the current ranking period */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the ranking (e.g., classical, blitz, rapid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the news article */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the news article (e.g., tournament, player, strategy) */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the article has received */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communities" (
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the community */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the community */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the community was created */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community moderator */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Community rules and guidelines */,
  "member_count" INTEGER /* Number of members in the community */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the community is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communities_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community member */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the community */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is an admin of the community */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_members_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_members_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who made the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the post was made */,
  "post_title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of the post (e.g., announcement, discussion, question) */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the post has received */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the post */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the post has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_posts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_posts_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is a default role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned to the player */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission (e.g., create_tournament, manage_players) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is a default permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
